December 2023 Learn how and when to remove this message .mw-parser-output .infobox-subbox .mw-parser-output .infobox-3cols-child .mw-parser-output .infobox .navbar screen screen and prefers-color-scheme:dark min-width:640px body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table caption body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table tbody body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table th,body.skin--responsive .mw-parser-output .infobox-table td Enkilum Chandrike Theatrical release poster Directed by Adithyan Chandrashekar Written by Arjun Narayanan Adithyan Chandrashekar Produced by Vijay Babu Starring .mw-parser-output .plainlist ol,.mw-parser-output .plainlist ul .mw-parser-output .plainlist ol li,.mw-parser-output .plainlist ul li Suraj Venjaramoodu Basil Joseph Saiju Kurup Tanvi Ram Niranjana Anoop Ashwin Vijayan Cinematography Jithin Stanislaus Edited by Lijo Paul Music by Ifthi Production company Friday Film House Release date 17 February 2023 2023-02-17 Country India Language Malayalam Box office 1.67 crore Enkilum Chandrike is a 2023 Indian Malayalam -language film directed by Adithyan Chandrashekar and produced by Vijay Babu under the banner of Friday Film House . It features Suraj Venjaramoodu , Basil Joseph , Saiju Kurup , Ashwin Vijayan, Niranjana Anoop and Tanvi Ram as the main leads. The film was released on 17 February 2023. Cast edit Suraj Venjaramoodu as Pavithran Basil Joseph as Kiran Saiju Kurup as Abhi, Chandrika's one-side love interest Niranjana Anoop as Chandrika, Sujina's younger sister Tanvi Ram as Sujina, Pavithran's love interest and Chandrika's elder sister Aswin Vijayan as Amal Rajesh Sharma as Ravindran Abhiram Radhakrishnan as Bibeesh Maniyanpilla Raju as Shambu Unni Raja as Photographer Neeraj Madhav as Abhishek, Chandrika's real love interest Cameo Appearance Production edit The film is the first feature film for director Adithyan Chandrashekar. 1 The title was announced in November 2022. 2 The production company announced that the film would be released on 10 February 2023, then postponing it to 17 February to coincide with other releases on that date. 3 The trailer was released on 4 February 2023. 4 Release edit The film was released in theatres on 17 February 2023. The digital rights were acquired by ManoramaMAX , and it started streaming on the platform and also via Amazon Prime Video Channels on 1 April 2023. 5 Reception edit The film received mixed responses upon release. Anna Mathews critic of The Times of India gave 3 out of 5 stars, calling it a "Mild entertainer". 6 S.R. Praveen from The Hindu wrote that "The humour falls flat in this old-fashioned tale" 7 India Today gave it 3 stars out of 5 and stated that "It's more about love and friendship in general, but Adithyan Chadrashekar and Arjun Narayanan have given us a film that we can enjoy and leave the theatre smiling. Box office edit According to Times of India , the film collected Rs 1.67 crores at the box office. 8 References edit .mw-parser-output cite.citation .mw-parser-output .citation q .mw-parser-output .citation:target .mw-parser-output .id-lock-free.id-lock-free a .mw-parser-output .id-lock-limited.id-lock-limited a,.mw-parser-output .id-lock-registration.id-lock-registration a .mw-parser-output .id-lock-subscription.id-lock-subscription a .mw-parser-output .cs1-ws-icon a body:not .skin-timeless :not .skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .id-lock-free a,body:not .skin-timeless :not .skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .id-lock-limited a,body:not .skin-timeless :not .skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .id-lock-registration a,body:not .skin-timeless :not .skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .id-lock-subscription a,body:not .skin-timeless :not .skin-minerva .mw-parser-output .cs1-ws-icon a .mw-parser-output .cs1-code .mw-parser-output .cs1-hidden-error .mw-parser-output .cs1-visible-error .mw-parser-output .cs1-maint .mw-parser-output .cs1-kern-left .mw-parser-output .cs1-kern-right .mw-parser-output .citation .mw-selflink screen html.skin-theme-clientpref-night .mw-parser-output .cs1-maint screen and prefers-color-scheme:dark Daily, Keralakaumudi. 4 Release edit The film was released in theatres on 17 February 2023.
